ext_desc.message: Simple speed dial bookmarks page, including search, add, edit, delete and dragging bookmarks.

favicon_size_individual_note.message: Leave empty to use the global size.

download_favicons_by_default.message: Download favicons from websites by default

download_favicons_by_default_note.message: When a favicon thumbnail is missing locally, download it in the background when the start page opens.

favicon_size_note.message: Default favicon image size on tiles. Individual tile settings take priority.

thumbnail_url_note.message: The image is cached locally and checked for updates periodically.

notice_thumbnail_url_failed.message: Failed to download the thumbnail from URL

url_field_tip.message: Enter URL or leave it blank if you want to create the folder

confirm_delete_images.message: Are you sure? All local thumbnails will be deleted.

confirm_clear_local_cache.message: Are you sure? All temporary local data will be deleted. Settings and local images will be preserved.

confirm_delete_bookmark.message: Are you sure you want to delete the bookmark ?

confirm_delete_folder.message: Are you sure you want to delete the folder and all its contents ?

confirm_restore_default_settings.message: Reset only local settings to defaults and disable synchronization? Synchronized data on the server will be preserved.

confirm_clear_sync_settings.message: Delete synchronized settings from the server and disable synchronization? Local settings, images, and cache will be preserved.

confirm_sync_remote_settings.message:
You have previously synchronized data!!
Do you want to overwrite your current local settings with your previously saved remote settings?

notice_cant_find_id.message: Cant find folder by id. Maybe you have not synced bookmarks

notice_sync_settings_cleared.message: Synchronized server data deleted; synchronization disabled

alert_file_type_fail_type.message:
Bad file type
Valid file type ($type$)

not_found_text.message: Can not find the folder by id. You may not have synchronized bookmarks, or you deleted | moved this folder.

thumbnails_setting_description.message: Settings in this section apply to all supported thumbnail sources: website screenshots, image URLs, and favicons. Locally uploaded images are never replaced automatically.

default_folder_sync_note.message: Sync is enabled. This setting is saved to Chrome Sync.

default_folder_local_note.message: Sync is disabled. This setting is saved on this device.

background_bing_text.message: Bing Image of the Day is a daily background photo featured on Bing’s homepage. Each day, Microsoft showcases a stunning or interesting image of nature, architecture, or culture from around the world

bing_permission_toast.message: Bing Image of the Day requires host permission to bing.com. You can enable this permission on the settings page by selecting the "Bing Image of the Day" option and confirming the permission

show_toolbar.message: Show search bar and folder selection

show_create_column.message: Show column for adding a bookmark

show_favicon.message: Show the Favicon next to the title

open_link_newtab.message: Open bookmarks and search in a new tab

auto_generate_thumbnail.message: Automatically get favicon when creating a bookmark

reset_local_default_description.message: Resets only local settings and disables synchronization. Synchronized server data is not deleted.

reset_sync_description.message: Deletes only synchronized settings from the server and disables synchronization. Local settings, images, and cache are preserved.

thumbnails_update_warn.message: Each thumbnail is refreshed from its selected source: website, image URL, or favicon. Locally uploaded images are preserved. Updating can affect performance.

thumbnails_auto_refresh_note.message: Checks and refreshes outdated thumbnails when the home page opens

thumbnails_auto_refresh_interval_note.message: Time between thumbnail refreshes, from 1 hour to 7 days

folder_preview.message: Thumbnails of sites on a folder instead of an icon

folder_preview_description.message: While this setting is enabled, thumbnails of 4 random sites from the folder will be displayed instead of the icon or custom picture.

backup_settings_description.message: Backup only for extension settings, excluding bookmarks and images

without_confirmation.message: Do not ask for confirmation when deleting

toggle_clipboard_access.message: Permission to read from the clipboard

toggle_clipboard_access_description.message: Allows the extension to read data from the clipboard to upload a bookmark thumbnail. The 'Upload from clipboard' action will become available in the bookmark editing window. If you're concerned about this permission, simply don't enable it.

thumbnails_update_delay_note.message: It can be useful when the page content is loading for a long time. The longer the delay, the longer the wait

close_tab_after_adding_bookmark.message: Automatically closing a tab if you have added it to bookmarks

close_tab_after_adding_bookmark_note.message: Only when adding via the context menu

search_failed.message: Could not search bookmarks. Please try again.

logo_external_note.message: Link to a third-party logo resource. Please be careful, the substring {{website}} must remain unchanged and be inserted into the appropriate place in the link.

search_results_display_folder_path.message: Full folder path on the tile

move_to_start.message: Move a bookmark to the top of the list inside a folder

bookmarks_sorting_warning.message: Drag-and-drop sorting will be disabled if one of the sorting options is selected

confirm_delete_selected_bookmarks.message: Are you sure you want to delete selected bookmarks ?

search_suggestions_permission_tooltip.message: Access to Google.com is needed for search autocomplete suggestions

incognito_access_note.message: You must allow the extension to run in private mode

notice_host_permissions.message: To create website thumbnails, permission from the user is required for the extension to access websites

host_permissions_info.message:
This permission is necessary for generating website screenshots. The extension does not collect, track, or modify your data on websites. The only modification that occurs after opening a separate window with the website is hiding the scroll bar on the site before generating the screenshot (to make the screenshot as scroll-bar-free as possible). The extension code is available on Github. If you are concerned about this permission, you can choose not to grant it, the extension will still function without it, but generating website screenshots for bookmarks will not be available.

This permission will be requested when attempting to take a website screenshot (if it is disabled). You can also manage this right in the browser settings by opening a window with detailed information about the extension.
